name: Potato Stuffed Cabbage
recipeInstructions:
1. Parboil the cabbage and separate the leaves.
2. Slice off part of the heavy stalk of each leaf by slicing parallel to the leaf (do not cut into the leaf).
3. Grate the potatoes, small inner leaves of cabbage, and one of the onions.
4. Mix together with rice, dill, and black pepper.
5. Beat egg whites until frothy and add to potato mixture.
6. Set aside two or three of the largest leaves.
7. Fill each remaining cabbage leaf with approximately 2 tablespoons of the potato mixture.
8. Fold up the bottom of the leaf, then fold in the sides, and roll up.
9. Secure with a toothpick if necessary.
10. Slice the reserved leaves and line the bottom of the crock pot with them.
11. Slice the second onion and layer on top of cabbage.
12. Add tomatoes, apple, and ginger.
13. Place rolled stuffed cabbages into the pot.
14. Cook at low heat for 4 to 5 hours.
